description: CompositionGrey polo neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with embroidered logo on left chestWash care1. Light machine wash2. Do not bleach 3. Warm iron on reverse 4. Do not dry clean 5. Dry flat/reverse 6. Do not scrubFittingComfort FitBring the preppy look back in vogue with this grey polo neck tee from lee. The minimalist embroidered logo and comfort fit give a fresh look to this all time classic, while the cotton fabric will keep you dry and comfortable through all seasons. Team this tee with denims or chinos for casual outings with friends or for brunching at the Sports club. Pair it with stylish footwear from the wide collection available at myntra to don that perfect look for brunches at the club or casual outings.Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-6', Shoulders-19"
